member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for report generation services

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.MainDirectory
member.summary: Main directory where RDLC report files are stored

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.ExternalDirectory
member.summary: External directory for offline or external reports

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.MaxReportSizeBytes
member.summary: Maximum size in bytes for a single report output (default 100MB)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.ReportGenerationTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Timeout for report generation in seconds (default 300 seconds / 5 minutes)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.EnableReportDefinitionCache
member.summary: Enable caching of report definitions (default true)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.MaxCachedReportDefinitions
member.summary: Maximum number of cached report definitions (default 100)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.CacheTtlMinutes
member.summary: Time-to-live for cached report definitions in minutes (default 60 minutes)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.EnableMemoryPooling
member.summary: Enable memory pooling for better performance (default true)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.MaxConcurrentReports
member.summary: Maximum number of concurrent report generation tasks. Default: 10

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.MaxConcurrentPrintJobs
member.summary: Maximum number of concurrent print jobs. Default: 5 (printing is slower than generation)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.PrintJobTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Timeout for print jobs in seconds. Default: 180 (3 minutes)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.EnableDetailedLogging
member.summary: Enable detailed logging for report operations (default false)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.AllowedReportExtensions
member.summary: Allowed file extensions for report files (default: .rdlc, .rdl)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.EnableStrictPathValidation
member.summary: Enable strict path validation to prevent directory traversal attacks (default true)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.QuestPdfLicenseType
member.summary: QuestPDF license tier: Community (free, OSS), Professional, or Enterprise. Default is Community which is free for projects with under $1M USD annual revenue.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions.MaxConcurrentQuestPdfReports
member.summary: Maximum number of concurrent QuestPDF generation tasks (default: ). When null, is applied.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Documents.DynamicReportDocument
member.summary: QuestPDF implementation that composes a fully dynamic, data-driven PDF from a .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Documents.DynamicReportDocument.IsValidLogoPath(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that is a safe, non-traversal image path. Prevents CWE-22 path traversal attacks by rejecting null bytes, relative directory components, and non-image file extensions.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Documents.ContainerAlignExtensions
member.summary: Internal extension to apply horizontal alignment to a QuestPDF container

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelColumnDefinition
member.summary: Column descriptor for advanced Excel generation (ClosedXML). Supports rich formatting, column widths, horizontal alignment, bold cells, Excel number format codes, and aggregate totals rows.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelColumnDefinition.ColumnName
member.summary: Exact column name as it appears in the source

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelColumnDefinition.Header
member.summary: Display header label written to the header row. Defaults to when not specified.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelColumnDefinition.Width
member.summary: Column width in character units. lets decide. Explicit width overrides auto-fit.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelColumnDefinition.NumberFormat
member.summary: Excel built-in or custom number format code applied to data cells. Examples: "#,##0.00", "$#,##0.00_);[Red]($#,##0.00)", "yyyy-MM-dd", "0.00%".

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelColumnDefinition.Alignment
member.summary: Horizontal alignment of data cells (default: )

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelColumnDefinition.IsBold
member.summary: When , data cells in this column are rendered in bold

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelColumnDefinition.IsHidden
member.summary: When the column is hidden from the rendered workbook

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelColumnDefinition.AggregateType
member.summary: Aggregate function applied in the totals row when is . Default: .

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelHeaderStyle
member.summary: Styling applied to the header row of an advanced Excel worksheet. Colours are expressed as 6-character HTML hex strings without the leading #.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelHeaderStyle.BackgroundColor
member.summary: Cell background colour as a 6-char HTML hex string (default: "4472C4" — Microsoft Blue).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelHeaderStyle.FontColor
member.summary: Font colour as a 6-char HTML hex string (default: "FFFFFF" — White).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelHeaderStyle.FontSize
member.summary: Font size in points (default: 11)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelHeaderStyle.Bold
member.summary: Bold header text (default: )

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelHeaderStyle.HorizontalAlignment
member.summary: Horizontal alignment of header cells (default: )

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelHeaderStyle.CorporateBlue
member.summary: Returns a deep-blue corporate header style (default)

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelHeaderStyle.DarkGreen
member.summary: Returns a dark-green header style

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelHeaderStyle.DarkGrey
member.summary: Returns a charcoal/dark-grey header style

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelHeaderStyle.LightBlue
member.summary: Returns a subtle light-blue header suitable for pastel themes

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelReportRequest
member.summary: Request model for advanced, richly formatted Excel workbook generation via ClosedXML. Supports multi-sheet workbooks with full corporate styling, freeze panes, auto-filter, aggregate formula rows, and workbook-level metadata.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelReportRequest.FileDownloadName
member.summary: Desired file name for the download (extension .xlsx is appended automatically if omitted).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelReportRequest.Author
member.summary: Author name stored in workbook document properties

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelReportRequest.Subject
member.summary: Subject stored in workbook document properties

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelReportRequest.Company
member.summary: Company name stored in workbook document properties

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelReportRequest.Keywords
member.summary: Keywords stored in workbook document properties

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelReportRequest.Worksheets
member.summary: One or more worksheet definitions that make up the workbook

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelWorksheetDefinition
member.summary: Defines a single worksheet within an advanced ClosedXML workbook. Supports rich header styling, freeze panes, auto-filter, alternating row shading, aggregate totals rows, and per-column formatting.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelWorksheetDefinition.Name
member.summary: Worksheet tab name shown in Excel

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelWorksheetDefinition.Data
member.summary: Source data to write into this worksheet

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelWorksheetDefinition.Columns
member.summary: Per-column rich formatting descriptors. When , all visible DataTable columns are exported with default styles.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelWorksheetDefinition.HeaderStyle
member.summary: Header row style. uses .

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelWorksheetDefinition.AutoFilter
member.summary: Enable Excel AutoFilter drop-downs on the header row (default: )

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelWorksheetDefinition.FreezeHeaderRow
member.summary: Freeze the header row so it stays visible while scrolling (default: )

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelWorksheetDefinition.AutoFitColumns
member.summary: Auto-fit column widths to their content after data is written (default: ). Explicit values override auto-fit.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelWorksheetDefinition.IncludeAggregateRow
member.summary: Render an aggregate totals row below the data using per-column values (default: ).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelWorksheetDefinition.AlternatingRowShading
member.summary: Apply alternating row background shading for readability (default: ).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelWorksheetDefinition.AlternatingRowColor
member.summary: Alternating row background colour as a 6-char HTML hex string (default: "DCE6F1" — light blue tint).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelWorksheetDefinition.WrapText
member.summary: Enable text wrapping for all data cells in this worksheet (default: ).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelColumnDefinition
member.summary: Column descriptor for simple Excel generation (MiniExcel). Controls header override, number formatting, and visibility.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelColumnDefinition.ColumnName
member.summary: Exact column name as it appears in the source

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelColumnDefinition.Header
member.summary: Display header label written to the first row. Defaults to when not specified.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelColumnDefinition.Format
member.summary: Optional .NET composite format string applied when projecting the value (e.g. "N2", "C2", "yyyy-MM-dd"). Note: MiniExcel renders cells as plain values; for rich in-cell formatting use with ClosedXML.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelColumnDefinition.IsHidden
member.summary: When the column is excluded from the output

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelReportRequest
member.summary: Request model for high-performance, stream-based Excel workbook generation via MiniExcel. Supports single and multi-sheet workbooks from or POCO sources.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelReportRequest.FileDownloadName
member.summary: Desired file name for the download (extension .xlsx is appended automatically if omitted).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelReportRequest.Worksheets
member.summary: One or more worksheet definitions that make up the workbook

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelWorksheetDefinition
member.summary: Defines a single worksheet within a simple MiniExcel workbook.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelWorksheetDefinition.Name
member.summary: Worksheet tab name shown in Excel

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelWorksheetDefinition.Data
member.summary: Source data to write into this worksheet

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelWorksheetDefinition.Columns
member.summary: Optional column descriptors for header overrides, format hints, and column visibility. When , all columns are exported using their original DataTable names.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelWorksheetDefinition.IncludeHeader
member.summary: When a header row is rendered (default: )

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme
member.summary: Defines the visual color theme applied to a QuestPDF report. Default values use the official Acontplus brand palette sourced from the AcontplusWeb design system (globals.css). Use to obtain pre-built presets.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.HeaderBackground
member.summary: Header row / page-header background color (hex). Default: #d61672 — Acontplus brand magenta.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.HeaderForeground
member.summary: Header row / page-header foreground (text) color (hex). Default: #FFFFFF — white.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.RowBackground
member.summary: Even (non-alternate) data row background color (hex). Default: #FFFFFF — white.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.AlternateRowBackground
member.summary: Odd (alternate) data row background color (hex). Default: #fdf2f8 — Acontplus blush / light pink.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.TotalsBackground
member.summary: Totals row background color (hex). Default: #fce7f3 — light pink, one step deeper than .

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.TotalsTextColor
member.summary: Totals row text color (hex). Default: #831843 — Acontplus deep wine / dark primary.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.AccentColor
member.summary: Primary accent used for section titles, dividers and highlights (hex). Default: #d61672 — Acontplus brand magenta.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.SecondaryAccentColor
member.summary: Secondary accent for charts, badges, call-out cells (hex). Default: #ffa901 — Acontplus brand amber.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.TextColor
member.summary: Default body text color (hex). Default: #252525 — Acontplus near-black foreground.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.MutedTextColor
member.summary: Muted / secondary text color used for dates, subtitles, footnotes (hex). Default: #8c8c8c — Acontplus muted foreground.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.KvKeyColor
member.summary: Key-value label (key column) text color (hex). Default: #be185d — Acontplus primary-dark.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.FooterTextColor
member.summary: Page footer text color (hex). Default: #8c8c8c — Acontplus muted foreground.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.BorderColor
member.summary: Default border / separator color (hex). Default: #eaeaea — Acontplus border.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.SuccessColor
member.summary: Success indicator color (hex). Default: #10b981 — Acontplus success emerald.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.WarningColor
member.summary: Warning indicator color (hex). Default: #f59e0b — Acontplus warning amber.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorTheme.ErrorColor
member.summary: Error / danger indicator color (hex). Default: #ef4444 — Acontplus error red.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorThemes
member.summary:
Factory class that provides ready-to-use presets.
Use these as a starting point and then override individual properties as needed.
Available presets:
— official Acontplus brand (magenta / pink).
— Acontplus amber / warm gold variant.
— conservative navy-blue for enterprise documents.
— deep teal / cyan palette.
— slate grey, zero color distraction.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorThemes.AcontplusDefault
member.summary: Official Acontplus brand theme — magenta header, blush alternates, deep-wine totals. Matches the AcontplusWeb design system.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorThemes.AcontplusAmber
member.summary: Acontplus Amber — the brand amber / warm-gold palette. Great for invoices, financial summaries and seasonal reports.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorThemes.Corporate
member.summary: Corporate — classic navy-blue enterprise theme. Conservative and widely accepted for legal, financial and government reports.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorThemes.Ocean
member.summary: Ocean — deep teal / cyan palette inspired by coastal blue. Fresh and modern; suitable for tech products and dashboards.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfColorThemes.Monochrome
member.summary: Monochrome — slate-grey, zero colour distraction. Best for formal reports, legal documents or when colour printing is unavailable.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings
member.summary: Page layout and typographic settings for a QuestPDF document

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.PageSize
member.summary: Standard page size preset (default: A4)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.Orientation
member.summary: Page orientation (default: Portrait)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.MarginTop
member.summary: Top margin in points (default: 30)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.MarginBottom
member.summary: Bottom margin in points (default: 30)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.MarginLeft
member.summary: Left margin in points (default: 25)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.MarginRight
member.summary: Right margin in points (default: 25)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.FontFamily
member.summary: Default content font family (default: "Helvetica")

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.FontSize
member.summary: Default body font size in points (default: 9)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.TableHeaderFontSize
member.summary: Table header font size in points (default: 9)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.TitleFontSize
member.summary: Document title font size in points (default: 16)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.SectionTitleFontSize
member.summary: Section heading font size in points (default: 12)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.ColorTheme
member.summary: Visual color theme applied throughout the document

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.ShowPageNumbers
member.summary: Render a page number footer automatically (default: true)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.ShowTimestamp
member.summary: Include document generation timestamp in footer (default: false)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.ShowWatermark
member.summary: Show company/brand watermark behind content (default: false)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.WatermarkText
member.summary: Watermark text rendered diagonally behind content

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings.LicenseType
member.summary: QuestPDF license type: Community or Professional/Enterprise (default: Community)

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfLicenseType
member.summary: QuestPDF license tier configuration

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfHeaderFooterOptions
member.summary: Configuration for the document-level header or footer band

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfHeaderFooterOptions.LeftText
member.summary: Primary text rendered left-aligned in the band

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfHeaderFooterOptions.CenterText
member.summary: Text rendered centered in the band

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfHeaderFooterOptions.RightText
member.summary: Text rendered right-aligned in the band

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfHeaderFooterOptions.LogoPath
member.summary: Path to an image file rendered on the left side of the header

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfHeaderFooterOptions.LogoMaxHeight
member.summary: Logo image max height in points (default: 30)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfHeaderFooterOptions.BackgroundColor
member.summary: Background color of the header/footer band as hex

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfHeaderFooterOptions.ShowBorderBottom
member.summary: Draw a bottom border line on the header band

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfHeaderFooterOptions.FontSize
member.summary: Font size for header/footer text (default: 8)

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfReportRequest
member.summary: Top-level request model for QuestPDF dynamic report generation

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfReportRequest.Title
member.summary: Document title displayed in the report header and PDF metadata

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfReportRequest.SubTitle
member.summary: Optional sub-title rendered below the main title

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfReportRequest.Author
member.summary: Author name stored in the PDF metadata

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfReportRequest.Subject
member.summary: Subject stored in the PDF metadata

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfReportRequest.FileDownloadName
member.summary: Desired file download name (without extension) returned in ReportResponse

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfReportRequest.Settings
member.summary: Page layout and theme configuration

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfReportRequest.GlobalHeader
member.summary: Global page header rendered on every page

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfReportRequest.GlobalFooter
member.summary: Global page footer rendered on every page. When null and Settings.ShowPageNumbers is true, a default page-number footer is generated.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfReportRequest.Sections
member.summary: Ordered list of content sections composed into the document body

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfSection
member.summary: Describes a single content section within a QuestPDF dynamic report. Sections are rendered in order inside the document body.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfSection.SectionTitle
member.summary: Optional heading displayed above section content

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfSection.Type
member.summary: Determines how section content is composed (default: DataTable)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfSection.Data
member.summary: Data source for DataTable sections

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfSection.Columns
member.summary: Column descriptors controlling visibility, ordering, and formatting. When empty all DataTable columns are rendered in declaration order.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfSection.ShowTotalsRow
member.summary: Render a totals/aggregate row after the last data row

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfSection.TextBlocks
member.summary: Text blocks rendered in a Text section

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfSection.KeyValues
member.summary: Ordered key-value pairs rendered in a two-column summary panel. Key = label, Value = display text.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfSection.CustomComposer
member.summary: Delegate invoked to compose arbitrary QuestPDF content when Type is Custom. The parameter is the container passed by QuestPDF.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfSection.PaddingBottom
member.summary: Spacing in points added below this section (default: 12)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfSection.PageBreakBefore
member.summary: When true the section always starts at the top of a new page

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTableColumn
member.summary: Describes a single column within a QuestPDF dynamic table section

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTableColumn.ColumnName
member.summary: Exact column name as it appears in the source DataTable

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTableColumn.Header
member.summary: Display header label (defaults to ColumnName if not set)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTableColumn.RelativeWidth
member.summary: Relative column width. When all columns specify a width the layout distributes space proportionally. Leave null to auto-distribute evenly.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTableColumn.Alignment
member.summary: Text alignment within the column cells (default: Left)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTableColumn.Format
member.summary: Optional .NET composite format string applied to the cell value (e.g., "N2", "C2", "yyyy-MM-dd")

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTableColumn.AggregateType
member.summary: Aggregate function rendered in the totals row (default: None)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTableColumn.IsHidden
member.summary: When true the column is hidden from the rendered output

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTableColumn.IsBold
member.summary: Optional CSS-style font weight: "bold" renders the cell text bold

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTextBlock
member.summary: A block of formatted text rendered in a text-type section

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTextBlock.Content
member.summary: The text content to render

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTextBlock.FontSize
member.summary: Font size override (null uses document default)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTextBlock.Bold
member.summary: Render content as bold text

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTextBlock.Italic
member.summary: Render content as italic text

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTextBlock.Color
member.summary: Hex color override for text (null uses theme default)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTextBlock.PaddingBottom
member.summary: Spacing in points added below this block

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Enums.ExcelHorizontalAlignment
member.summary: Horizontal cell alignment for Excel output

member.name: F:Acontplus.Reports.Enums.ExcelHorizontalAlignment.General
member.summary: General alignment (Excel default – numbers right, text left)

member.name: F:Acontplus.Reports.Enums.ExcelHorizontalAlignment.Left
member.summary: Left-aligned text

member.name: F:Acontplus.Reports.Enums.ExcelHorizontalAlignment.Center
member.summary: Centred text

member.name: F:Acontplus.Reports.Enums.ExcelHorizontalAlignment.Right
member.summary: Right-aligned text (typical for numeric columns)

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Enums.ExcelAggregateType
member.summary: Aggregate function rendered in the totals row of an Excel worksheet

member.name: F:Acontplus.Reports.Enums.ExcelAggregateType.None
member.summary: No aggregate (default)

member.name: F:Acontplus.Reports.Enums.ExcelAggregateType.Sum
member.summary: SUM formula

member.name: F:Acontplus.Reports.Enums.ExcelAggregateType.Average
member.summary: AVERAGE formula

member.name: F:Acontplus.Reports.Enums.ExcelAggregateType.Count
member.summary: COUNT formula (counts numeric cells)

member.name: F:Acontplus.Reports.Enums.ExcelAggregateType.CountA
member.summary: COUNTA formula (counts non-empty cells)

member.summary: Page size presets for QuestPDF documents

member.summary: Thermal/receipt-style narrow format (80mm wide)

member.summary: Page orientation for QuestPDF documents

member.summary: Column content alignment within QuestPDF table cells

member.summary: Type of section rendered inside a QuestPDF document

member.summary: Render a DataTable as a formatted grid

member.summary: Render a custom composed element via delegate

member.summary: Exception thrown when report generation fails

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Exceptions.ReportSizeExceededException
member.summary: Exception thrown when report size exceeds maximum allowed

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Exceptions.ReportTimeoutException
member.summary: Exception thrown when report generation times out

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Exceptions.ReportNotFoundException
member.summary: Exception thrown when report file is not found

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Exceptions.InvalidReportPathException
member.summary: Exception thrown when an invalid or potentially malicious report path is detected

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Exceptions.InvalidReportPathException.FromSecurityException(System.Security.SecurityException,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an InvalidReportPathException from a SecurityException thrown by PathSecurityValidator

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering report services in the dependency injection container

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddReportServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds report generation services to the service collection

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddReportServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions})
member.summary: Adds report generation services with custom configuration

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddQuestPdfReportService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers only the QuestPDF dynamic PDF generation service without the RDLC stack. Use this when you need QuestPDF exclusively.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddQuestPdfReportService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions})
member.summary: Registers only the QuestPDF dynamic PDF generation service without the RDLC stack. Use this when you need QuestPDF exclusively.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMiniExcelReportService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers only the MiniExcel service for high-performance bulk Excel exports. Use this when you need lightweight Excel generation without the full RDLC/QuestPDF stack.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMiniExcelReportService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions})
member.summary: Registers only the MiniExcel service with custom configuration.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddClosedXmlReportService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers only the ClosedXML service for advanced, richly formatted Excel workbooks. Use this when you need corporate styling, formulas, and freeze panes without the full stack.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddClosedXmlReportService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions})
member.summary: Registers only the ClosedXML service with custom configuration.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IClosedXmlReportService
member.summary: Advanced, richly formatted Excel report service powered by ClosedXML. Supports corporate header styling, freeze panes, AutoFilter, alternating row shading, aggregate/formula totals rows, multi-sheet workbooks, and workbook metadata.

remarks.para: When to use ClosedXML: invoices, financial statements, management dashboards, any report where presentation and in-cell formulas matter, or when the consumer edits the file.
For raw bulk data exports with minimal overhead use instead.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IClosedXmlReportService.GenerateAsync(Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelReportRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a fully formatted Excel workbook (.xlsx) from an .
member.param: Workbook definition including worksheets, header styles, column formatting, and metadata.
member.returns: with the workbook bytes and MIME metadata.

member.summary: Convenience shortcut that wraps a single into a formatted single-sheet workbook.
member.param: Desired download file name (extension appended if absent).
Optional per-column rich formatting descriptors. exports all columns with default styles.
Enable AutoFilter on the header row (default: ).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IMiniExcelReportService
member.summary: High-performance, stream-based Excel report service powered by MiniExcel. Designed for large-dataset exports with minimal memory overhead — data is streamed directly to the output without loading the entire workbook into memory.

remarks.para: When to use MiniExcel: bulk data exports, large DataTable results, POCO collections, API-driven CSV/Excel downloads where speed and memory efficiency matter more than rich formatting.
For richly formatted workbooks with corporate styles, freeze panes, formulas, and aggregates use instead.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IMiniExcelReportService.GenerateAsync(Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelReportRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates an Excel workbook (.xlsx) from a fully configured . Supports both single-sheet and multi-sheet workbooks.
member.param: Workbook definition including one or more worksheet sources.
member.returns: with the workbook bytes and MIME metadata.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IMiniExcelReportService.GenerateFromDataTableAsync(System.String,System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelColumnDefinition},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Convenience shortcut that wraps a single into a one-sheet workbook.
member.param: Desired download file name (extension appended if absent).
Optional column descriptors for header overrides, format hints, and visibility. exports all columns with their original names.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IMiniExcelReportService.GenerateFromObjectsAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exports a strongly-typed collection to a single-sheet workbook using MiniExcel's native POCO serialisation. Column headers are derived from public property names unless decorated with MiniExcelLibs.Attributes.ExcelColumnNameAttribute.
member.typeparam: POCO type whose public properties become columns.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IQuestPdfReportService
member.summary: Service for generating dynamic PDF documents using QuestPDF. Supports data-driven table reports, multi-section layouts, key-value summaries, rich text blocks, and fully custom composed content.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IQuestPdfReportService.GenerateAsync(Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfReportRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a PDF from a fully configured .
member.param: Complete document definition including sections, settings, and headers.
member.returns: containing the PDF bytes and content metadata.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IQuestPdfReportService.GenerateFromDataTableAsync(System.String,System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfTableColumn},Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.QuestPdfDocumentSettings,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Convenience overload that wraps a single in a report.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IQuestPdfReportService.ValidateConfiguration
member.summary: Validates that all required QuestPDF dependencies and licence settings are properly configured without generating a full document. Throws on misconfiguration.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IRdlcPrinterService.PrintAsync(Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.RdlcPrinterDto,Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.RdlcPrintRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Prints a report asynchronously with support for cancellation and timeout

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IRdlcReportService
member.summary: Service for generating RDLC reports with support for multiple formats and data sources

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IRdlcReportService.GetReportAsync(System.Data.DataSet,System.Data.DataSet,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a report asynchronously from the provided parameters and data
member.param: DataSet containing report parameters, data sources configuration, and report properties
DataSet containing the actual data for the report
Whether to use external directory for report files
Cancellation token to cancel the operation
member.returns: ReportResponse containing the generated report content

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IRdlcReportService.GetErrorAsync
member.summary: Gets a default error report (typically a "Not Found" PDF)

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Interfaces.IRdlcReportService.GetReport(System.Data.DataSet,System.Data.DataSet,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Legacy synchronous method - prefer using GetReportAsync for better performance

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Services.ClosedXmlReportService
member.summary: Advanced, richly formatted Excel generation service using ClosedXML. Supports corporate header styling, freeze panes, AutoFilter, alternating row shading, aggregate formula totals rows, multi-sheet workbooks, and workbook metadata.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Services.ClosedXmlReportService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Acontplus.Reports.Services.ClosedXmlReportService},Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions})
member.summary: Initialises a new .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Services.ClosedXmlReportService.BuildEffectiveColumns(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.List{Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.AdvancedExcelColumnDefinition})
member.summary: Merges explicit overrides with the DataTable column order. DataTable columns not covered by the list use default settings.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Services.MemoryStreamPool
member.summary: Thread-safe object pool for MemoryStream instances to reduce GC pressure

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Services.MemoryStreamPool.GetStream
member.summary: Gets a pooled MemoryStream

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Services.PooledMemoryStream
member.summary: MemoryStream wrapper that returns rented arrays to the pool when disposed

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Services.MiniExcelReportService
member.summary: High-performance, stream-based Excel generation service using MiniExcel. Data is streamed directly to the output buffer — no in-memory DOM — making it ideal for large dataset exports.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Services.MiniExcelReportService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Acontplus.Reports.Services.MiniExcelReportService},Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions})
member.summary: Initialises a new .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Services.MiniExcelReportService.MapWorksheetToRows(Acontplus.Reports.Dtos.ExcelWorksheetDefinition)
member.summary: Projects a to a row-per-record sequence of . Hidden columns are excluded and header labels are applied from .

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Services.QuestPdfReportService
member.summary: High-performance QuestPDF dynamic PDF generation service with concurrency control, timeout protection, and full enterprise reporting patterns.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Reports.Services.QuestPdfReportService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Acontplus.Reports.Services.QuestPdfReportService},Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Acontplus.Reports.Configuration.ReportOptions})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of . Applies the QuestPDF license at construction time.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Services.RdlcReportService
member.summary: High-performance RDLC report generation service with async support, caching, and concurrency control

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Services.CachedReportDefinition
member.summary: Cache entry for report definitions with expiration

member.name: T:Acontplus.Reports.Services.ReportDefinitionCache
member.summary: Thread-safe cache for report definitions with size limits and TTL
